testcase.name: Group 1 — Admin ⇄ Project-Admin lifecycle › [P0] step 1 — admin creates & renames a project
Group 1 — Admin ⇄ Project-Admin lifecycle › [P0] step 2 — configure the project and add an account
Group 1 — Admin ⇄ Project-Admin lifecycle › [P0] step 3 — admin deletes the project
Group 4 — PTP Claude SSO › [P0] navigate to the provider step
Group 4 — PTP Claude SSO › [P1] Claude SSO card exposes the Login SSO button (feature pending)
Group 5 — Multiple projects, PT Tool Claude SSO › [P0] multi-project workspace: both projects bootstrapped and listed
Group 5 — Multiple projects, PT Tool Claude SSO › [P1] open PT Tool thread; Claude SSO card exposes the Login SSO button (feature pending)
Group 6 — Multiple projects, PTP on-prem (up to Bob) › [P0] multi-project workspace: both projects bootstrapped and listed
Group 6 — Multiple projects, PTP on-prem (up to Bob) › [P0] configure On-Premises provider on the PTP thread
Group 7 — PT Tool on-prem (up to Bob) › [P0] navigate to the provider step
Group 7 — PT Tool on-prem (up to Bob) › [P0] configure On-Premises provider
Group 8 — Isolated throwaway project, on-prem (provider config + Bob ready) › [P0] open the isolated project's thread → Alice asks for a provider
Group 8 — Isolated throwaway project, on-prem (provider config + Bob ready) › [P0] configure On-Premises for real — live connection test + model discovery
testcase.system-out: [group-8 cleanup] OK: project "E2E Isolated OnPrem 1782982107733-9kissijesw6" removed (DB + file storage).
